examples: The upper chamber on each side is called the atrium.
Twenty-six meeting pods float in midair around the 10-story atrium...
I stood in the impressive atrium and found myself thinking of the Hyatt Regency hotel in Atlanta.
Carved out of the space in the center is an atrium with a spectacular stair.
Crews removed the library, where most of the victims died, and replaced it with an atrium.
